name: Denethix Watchguard
reasoning: V3 is the strongest choice. It features clean anatomy with no AI artifacts, excellent prompt adherence (soldier in chain mail with shield and sword, alert stance, stone gate, medieval fortifications with towering ruins), and superior composition with the soldier centered and framed by the gate archway—highly readable at card size. The warm sandstone/ivory tones and golden-hour lighting match the color identity perfectly. V1 has a photorealistic style that doesn't match the "stylized digital illustration" requirement, while V2's soldier is positioned too far to the right and the composition is less balanced.

artifacts_found.issue: Photorealistic rendering style rather than stylized digital illustration; composition less balanced with soldier off-center
Soldier positioned too far right, unbalanced composition; less structured framing compared to v3
